title: EditPlan
description: Schema for the edit plan generated by IntentExtractor.

goal.title: Goal
goal.description: The high-level goal or objective extracted from user input.

explanation.title: Explanation
explanation.description: A brief explanation of the planned changes and the engineering rationale.

files_to_edit.title: Files To Edit
files_to_edit.description: List of file paths relative to the repository root that are allowed to be modified.

acceptance_criteria.title: Acceptance Criteria
acceptance_criteria.description: Falsifiable validation conditions or criteria to satisfy for the changes to be merged.

constraints.title: Constraints
constraints.description: Existing codebase constraints, non-goals, and rules (e.g. files/directories that must not be modified or broken).
